Two verification warnings remain: (1) an internal inconsistency where semantic correctness is both marked as 'not evaluated' and assigned positive semantic scores in raw_model_output/rubric_item_scores, and (2) the .xlsx workbook could not be parsed in this environment (openpyxl unavailable), so formula-level audibility, per-cell provenance, hidden-sheet checks, and macro/external-link verification remain unvalidated. Addressing these will improve auditability and remove verifier warnings.
label: positive
